available.label: SOUL.md
available.description: Import the OpenClaw persona file into Hermes.

available.label: Workspace instructions
available.description: Copy the OpenClaw workspace instructions file into a chosen workspace.

available.label: MEMORY.md
available.description: Import long-term memory entries into Hermes memories.

available.label: USER.md
available.description: Import user profile entries into Hermes memories.

available.label: Messaging settings
available.description: Import Hermes-compatible messaging settings such as allowlists and working directory.

available.label: Allowlisted secrets
available.description: Import the small allowlist of Hermes-compatible secrets when explicitly enabled.

available.label: Command allowlist
available.description: Merge OpenClaw exec approval patterns into Hermes command_allowlist.

available.label: User skills
available.description: Copy OpenClaw skills into ~/.hermes/skills/openclaw-imports/.

available.label: TTS assets
available.description: Copy compatible workspace TTS assets into ~/.hermes/tts/.

available.label: Discord settings
available.description: Import Discord bot token and allowlist into Hermes .env.

available.label: Slack settings
available.description: Import Slack bot/app tokens and allowlist into Hermes .env.

available.label: WhatsApp settings
available.description: Import WhatsApp allowlist into Hermes .env.

available.label: Signal settings
available.description: Import Signal account, HTTP URL, and allowlist into Hermes .env.

available.label: Provider API keys
available.description: Import model provider API keys into Hermes .env (requires --migrate-secrets).

available.label: Default model
available.description: Import the default model setting into Hermes config.yaml.

available.label: TTS configuration
available.description: Import TTS provider and voice settings into Hermes config.yaml.

available.label: Shared skills
available.description: Copy shared OpenClaw skills from ~/.openclaw/skills/ into Hermes.

available.label: Daily memory files
available.description: Merge daily memory entries from workspace/memory/ into Hermes MEMORY.md.

available.label: Archive unmapped docs
available.description: Archive compatible-but-unmapped docs for later manual review.

available.label: MCP servers
available.description: Import MCP server definitions from OpenClaw into Hermes config.yaml.

available.label: Plugins configuration
available.description: Archive OpenClaw plugin configuration and installed extensions for manual review.

available.label: Cron / scheduled tasks
available.description: Import cron job definitions. Archive for manual recreation via 'hermes cron'.

available.label: Hooks and webhooks
available.description: Archive OpenClaw hook configuration (internal hooks, webhooks, Gmail integration).

available.label: Agent defaults and multi-agent setup
available.description: Import agent defaults (compaction, context, thinking) into Hermes config. Archive multi-agent list.

available.label: Gateway configuration
available.description: Import gateway port and auth settings. Archive full gateway config for manual setup.

available.label: Session configuration
available.description: Import session reset policies (daily/idle) into Hermes session_reset config.

available.label: Full model provider definitions
available.description: Import custom model providers (baseUrl, apiType, headers) into Hermes custom_providers.

available.label: Deep channel configuration
available.description: Import extended channel settings (Matrix, Mattermost, IRC, group configs). Archive complex settings.

available.label: Browser configuration
available.description: Import browser automation settings into Hermes config.yaml.

available.label: Tools configuration
available.description: Import tool settings (exec timeout, sandbox, web search) into Hermes config.yaml.

available.label: Approval rules
available.description: Import approval mode and rules into Hermes config.yaml approvals section.

available.label: Memory backend configuration
available.description: Archive OpenClaw memory backend settings (QMD, vector search, citations) for manual review.

available.label: Skills registry configuration
available.description: Archive per-skill enabled/config/env settings from OpenClaw skills.entries.

available.label: UI and identity settings
available.description: Archive OpenClaw UI theme, assistant identity, and display preferences.

available.label: Logging and diagnostics
available.description: Archive OpenClaw logging and diagnostics configuration.
